description: "Michigan court rules quick reference for filing. MCR procedures, SCAO form numbers, service requirements, filing fees, deadlines. Apply when generating any court filing."
applyTo: "**/*.{md,txt,docx,py}"
---

# Michigan Court Rules Memory

Quick reference for Michigan Court Rules (MCR), SCAO forms, service requirements, and court-specific procedures. Apply to ALL filing generation.

## MCR 2.003 — Disqualification of Judge

- **Filing**: Motion + Affidavit of Bias (specific facts, not conclusions)
- **Timing**: Must file "as soon as reasonable" after discovering grounds
- **Grounds**: MCR 2.003(C)(1)(a) personal knowledge, (b) bias/prejudice, (c) prior involvement
- **Chief Judge reassigns** if granted — BUT if Chief Judge (Hoopes) is compromised, must petition MSC
- **Auto-disqualification**: MCR 2.003(B) — judge's own motion when impartiality might be questioned

## MCR 2.107 — Service of Process

- **Personal service**: MCR 2.105 — serve on individual personally
- **Substituted service**: MCR 2.105(A)(2) — leave at dwelling with person of suitable age
- **Mail service**: MCR 2.107(C)(3) — first-class mail to last known address for post-filing motions
- **E-filing service**: Via TrueFiling/MiFILE — counts as service if opposing party e-files
- **Proof of service**: MC 12 (general), MC 302 (PPO) — REQUIRED for every filing
- **Timeline**: Service must occur BEFORE or simultaneously with filing

## MCR 2.612 — Relief From Judgment

- **MCR 2.612(C)(1)(a)**: Mistake, inadvertence, excusable neglect
- **MCR 2.612(C)(1)(b)**: Newly discovered evidence
- **MCR 2.612(C)(1)(c)**: Fraud, misrepresentation, misconduct of adverse party
- **MCR 2.612(C)(1)(f)**: Any other reason justifying relief (catch-all)
- **Timing**: Must file within "reasonable time" — (a)(b)(c) within 1 year of judgment

## MCR 3.206 — Custody/Parenting Time Motions

- **Proper cause / change of circumstances** required to modify (Vodvarka v. Grasmeyer)
- **Best Interest Factors**: MCL 722.23(a)-(l) — ALL 12 must be addressed
- **Established Custodial Environment (ECE)**: If ECE exists, clear and convincing evidence required
- **Friend of Court**: FOC investigation may be requested or ordered

## MCR 3.707 — Personal Protection Orders

- **Ex parte PPO**: Can be issued without hearing if "immediate and irreparable injury"
- **Hearing within 14 days** if respondent requests (MCR 3.707(A))
- **Modification/Termination**: Motion under MCR 3.707(B) — must show changed circumstances
- **Contempt for PPO violation**: MCL 764.15b — criminal contempt possible

## MCR 7.212 — Appellate Briefs (Court of Appeals)

- **Length**: 50 pages maximum (or 16,000 words) excluding tables/appendix
- **Format**: Double-spaced, 12pt Times New Roman or equivalent
- **Required sections**: Table of Contents, Index of Authorities, Jurisdictional Statement, Statement of Questions, Statement of Facts, Argument, Relief Requested
- **Appendix**: MCR 7.212(D) — lower court opinions, orders, relevant pleadings
- **Filing deadline**: 56 days from claim of appeal (or as extended) — **COA 366810 due April 15, 2026**

## MCR 7.305/7.306 — MSC Original Jurisdiction

- **MCR 7.305(B)**: Application for leave to appeal
- **MCR 7.306**: Original proceedings (superintending control, mandamus, habeas corpus)
- **When to use**: When lower courts are compromised and no adequate remedy exists
- **Content**: Complaint + brief + proposed order + proof of service

## SCAO Form Numbers (Key Forms)

| Form | Name | Use |
|------|------|-----|
| MC 01 | Case Inventory Addendum | All new filings |
| MC 12 | Proof of Service | Every filing — MANDATORY |
| MC 20 | Fee Waiver Request | In forma pauperis |
| MC 302 | PPO (Domestic Relationship) | PPO filings |
| MC 375 | Motion | General motion filing |
| MC 376 | Response to Motion | Opposing a motion |
| DC 100 | Complaint | Custody complaint |
| DC 101 | Summons | With new complaints |
| FOC 10 | Uniform Child Support Order | Support modifications |
| FOC 89 | Parenting Time Complaint | Parenting time enforcement |
| CC 257 | Civil Cover Sheet | Circuit civil cases |
| COA 1 | Claim of Appeal | COA filings |
| JS 44 | Civil Cover Sheet (Federal) | Federal complaints |
| AO 239 | IFP Application (Federal) | Federal fee waiver |

## Filing Fee Schedule (2026)

| Court | Filing Type | Fee |
|-------|------------|-----|
| Circuit Court | Motion | $20 |
| Circuit Court | New case/complaint | $175 |
| Court of Appeals | Application for leave | $375 |
| Court of Appeals | Claim of appeal | $375 |
| MSC | Application for leave | $375 |
| Federal (WDMI) | Complaint | $405 |
| Federal (WDMI) | IFP waiver | $0 (if granted) |
| JTC | Complaint | $0 (no fee) |

## Certificate of Service Template Requirements

Every filed document MUST include:
1. Title: "CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE" or "PROOF OF SERVICE"
2. Date of service (must be current year — 2026)
3. Method of service (personal, mail, e-filing, email)
4. Complete name and address of ALL parties served
5. Signature of person performing service
6. **If Barnes withdrew**: Serve Emily Watson DIRECTLY at 2160 Garland Dr, Norton Shores, MI 49441
